expectations.evidence: Finding: 'Unsanitized HTML Rendered via dangerouslySetInnerHTML · 🟠 High · A03 Injection' — explicitly names dangerouslySetInnerHTML, XSS, and High severity
Finding: 'Auth Token Stored in localStorage · 🟡 Medium · A07 Auth Failures' — explicitly flags localStorage.setItem('auth_token', token)
Fix shows DOMPurify.sanitize() code block AND alternative of using React's auto-escaping with plain text rendering
Both findings include OWASP category: A03 Injection (XSS) and A07 Auth Failures
Report uses severity emoji (🟠 High, 🟡 Medium), OWASP category labels, Evidence code blocks, Location field, Confidence field, and 'What Looks Good' section
